pr.title: 4 the Leaderboard: 11L Int6 + SmearGate + Batch Optimization (val_bpb=1.1400)

output.summary: 11-layer int6-quantized GPT with SmearGate + BigramHash, batched sliding eval, and smaller 524K-token batches to raise step count in 600s training.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantization for attention/MLP and Int8 tied embeddings
SmearGate plus BigramHash in the 11-layer, 26.5M-parameter stack
Reduced 524K-token batch to maximize gradient steps within 600s
